personal.name: Waiz Tahseen
personal.bio: I am an 18-year-old highly skilled full-stack web developer with 3 years of experience. I specialize in building complex, modern, and highly polished web applications, CRMs, and 3D experiences. With an expert ability in problem-solving, I navigate complex technical challenges effortlessly. Utilizing a hybrid workflow of AI tools and deep manual coding expertise, I deliver world-class software at unprecedented speeds.

projects.title: Boomers Insurance CRM
projects.description: A massive CRM portal built for a Medicare insurance company in the USA. Handled complex data routing, agent management, and analytics.

projects.title: AI SaaS Dashboard
projects.description: A fully functional AI SaaS platform allowing users to generate content with integrated billing and user management.

projects.title: Multiplayer FPS Web Game
projects.description: A tactical 3D shooter built entirely for the browser with multiplayer capabilities, custom loadouts, and dynamic arenas.

experience.description: Developed and delivered 30-50 high-quality web applications, CRMs, and websites for Stream Design Studio as well as personal clients globally. Leveraged AI to accelerate development without compromising quality.
